narrative:
North Royalton-03-B (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,026 registered voters, with 58.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.4 percentage points.
